creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 231051
Screenshot of the most recently received automated e-mail

(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

At 15:31: 

> … First noticed around twenty-five minutes ago, …

The most recent automated e-mail, to me, about an update, was sent at: 

14:11

– screenshot attached. 

----

Not chasing, just adding a little info in case it helps to identify the time of the incident. 

Thanks
